blocks.content: He heard the bike before he saw it — the familiar squeak of Daisy's chain, coming along the fence line from Magnolia Street.
She appeared at the edge of the field and stopped when she saw him.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Oh.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Yeah.
She leaned her bike against the fence post and came and stood beside him. Close enough that their arms were almost touching. The fireflies went on with their business.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I come out here most nights in summer.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I know. I've seen you from the porch. Didn't want to bother you.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You never bother me.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Do you ever try to catch them?

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: When I was little. Never could.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I caught one once. In my hands.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Did it glow?

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: No. In your hands they just stop.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: That's kind of sad.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I don't think so. I think they just need the dark for it to work. They're not really for catching.
He thought about that.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Do you think about the future?
She looked at him sideways.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: What kind of question is that.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: A genuine one.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Kit Jenkins asking a genuine question. Mark the calendar.
She was quiet for a moment, looking out at the field.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Not in a specific way. More like — I just want to still be doing this. Whatever this is.
She gestured at all of it — the field, the dark, the town behind them settling into night.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Me too.
A beat.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Don't make it weird.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I wasn't.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You were about to.
A firefly came up between them, blinked once, green-gold, and was gone.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Today was really good.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Especially the soaked part.
He looked at her when she said that. She was smiling at the field.
